jd_text:
Essential Responsibilities

Extend and enhance our in-house platform for managing and automating SaaS deployments into AWS environments.
Write and maintain Java code to deploy and integrate AWS resources for our offerings
Design, implement, and maintain AWS infrastructure components for SaaS deployments
Troubleshoot and resolve deployment and infrastructure issues
Participate in code reviews and maintain documentation for technical solutions
Follow established SDLC processes and development standards
Support testing and validation of platform deployments and updates

Desired Experience

Degree or equivalent in Computer Science or related technical field
Proven hands-on AWS experience in a professional environment
Must be proficient and comfortable with Java development workflows
Experience with software development in a team environment

Preferred Experience

Experience with specific AWS services (EC2, ECS, RDS, Lambda, S3, VPC, CloudFormation)
Strong knowledge of AWS networking and security controls, including VPC design, subnet isolation, VPN connectivity, VPC peering, and PrivateLink
Usage of IaaC (Terraform/OpenTofu/Pulumi) for managing resources
Knowledge of containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)
Experience with Linux/Unix environments
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
Knowledge of build systems (Maven, Gradle)

Required Skills & Abilities

Strong programming skills with detailed knowledge of Java
Hands-on experience with AWS cloud services and infrastructure
Strong analytical, problem-solving and fact-finding skills
Proven organizational skills, with the ability to deliver agreed workload within deadlines whilst maintaining a high degree of accuracy and attention to detail
Self-starter who is happy to learn from colleagues
Great communicator with strong collaboration skills
Problem solver with determination and persistence
Focused on activities that add value and avoiding those that do not
Maintain the highest standards of integrity and respect for coworkers, customers, and prospects

Work Environment

The work arrangement for this position may vary and can be one of the following options: remote, hybrid, and/or in-office. The determination will be made in the job offer and is subject to business needs.

responsibilities: Extend and enhance our in-house platform for managing and automating SaaS deployments into AWS environments.
Write and maintain Java code to deploy and integrate AWS resources for our offerings
Design, implement, and maintain AWS infrastructure components for SaaS deployments
Troubleshoot and resolve deployment and infrastructure issues
Participate in code reviews and maintain documentation for technical solutions
Follow established SDLC processes and development standards
Support testing and validation of platform deployments and updates

gaps.note: Only add missing skills if you actually have hands-on experience. Do not fake skills.

suggestions: JD mentions VPC peering. Only add if you have hands-on experience; otherwise ignore.
JD mentions VPN connectivity. Only add if you have configured site-to-site or client VPN; otherwise ignore.
Mirror the JD language in bullets using skills you already have, without changing facts (example: 'deployment validation', 'troubleshooting', 'documentation').
If applying anyway, be ready to explain Java exposure honestly. If no Java, this role may be a low-fit.
base_resume:
SUMMARY 	
Senior DevOps Engineer with 7 years of experience building and operating AWS platforms and cloud-native infrastructure. AWS Solutions Architect Professional and Certified Kubernetes Administrator with strong capability in Terraform, Kubernetes operations, CI/CD delivery, and reliability practices. Experienced in creating secure, highly available environments using multi-AZ designs, IAM least privilege, KMS encryption, and audit-ready logging with CloudTrail. Known for improving operational consistency through automation, runbooks, and structured release workflows across development, staging, and production.

EDUCATION
Christian Brothers University, Memphis, TN 	Graduation 2025
MS in Computer Information Systems

WORK EXPERIENCE
Charter Communications, DevOps Engineer (Contract), Remote, US | Aug 2025 to Present
•	Provisioned AWS infrastructure with Terraform across VPC networking, IAM, EC2, S3, load balancing, autoscaling, and subnet segmentation to support stable production workloads.
•	Improved availability and fault isolation by applying multi-AZ patterns and secure connectivity between services.
•	Operated and refined Jenkins and GitHub Actions pipelines with validation steps and release controls for safer deployments.
•	Created Python and Bash tooling for environment checks and deployment support, improving repeatability of routine tasks.
•	Improved visibility by building CloudWatch dashboards and tuning alerts to speed up incident detection and response.
•	Supported patching cycles, vulnerability remediation, and access reviews aligned to internal security standards.
•	Authored runbooks and standard operating procedures to standardize incident response and operational workflows.

Kwalee, Senior DevOps Engineer, Bengaluru, India | Feb 2022 to Jul 2023
•	Partnered with engineering teams to maintain reliability of AWS and Kubernetes environments through release readiness, change control, and operational practices.
•	Designed secure AWS networking including VPC segmentation, private subnets, NAT gateways, route tables, security groups, and Route 53 for controlled connectivity.
•	Established audit-ready logging and encryption using CloudTrail and KMS to strengthen traceability and governance.
•	Introduced Terraform module patterns and remote state practices to reduce drift and enable consistent environment recreation across stages.
•	Evolved CI/CD workflows in Jenkins and GitHub Actions with validation gates and rollback paths to reduce deployment risk.
•	Ran Kubernetes operations with namespace isolation, RBAC enforcement, scheduling, and resource controls using requests and limits.
•	Led rolling deployments, upgrade planning, node lifecycle management, and troubleshooting across probes, scheduling, and networking issues.
•	Reduced alert noise and improved on-call effectiveness by tuning thresholds and ensuring alerts reflect actionable risk.
•	Created and maintained runbooks and response procedures to improve incident consistency and knowledge sharing.

Side Inc, Hyderabad, India | Aug 2016 to Feb 2022
Senior DevOps Engineer | Oct 2018 to Feb 2022
•	Led end-to-end delivery pipeline upgrades in Jenkins and GitHub Actions, including artifact versioning, validation gates, and controlled releases across environments.
•	Built reusable Terraform modules and patterns that reduced drift and made shared infrastructure easier to maintain across multiple services.
•	Strengthened AWS platform reliability through updates to VPC design, IAM controls, load balancing, autoscaling, and storage configuration.
•	Managed AWS container platforms including ECS and Fargate, improving scaling behavior and runtime stability for containerized services.
•	Expanded monitoring with CloudWatch dashboards and log-driven troubleshooting workflows to improve incident triage and operational readiness.
•	Drove operational readiness through runbooks, deployment checklists, and post-incident reviews to improve response consistency and reduce repeat issues.

DevOps Engineer | Aug 2016 to Sept 2018
•	Supported CI/CD automation for build, test, and deployment flows across development and staging environments.
•	Wrote Python and Bash scripts for health checks, validation routines, and routine maintenance tasks to reduce manual effort.
•	Supported AWS infrastructure provisioning and changes across VPC components, IAM policies, autoscaling, load balancing, and storage services.
•	Assisted with containerization using Docker and supported early Kubernetes adoption through deployment validation, service configuration, and basic troubleshooting.
•	Participated in on-call rotations and incident response, contributing to root cause notes and operational follow-ups. 

TECHNICAL SKILLS	
•	Computer Languages: Python, Bash, SQL
•	Tools: Terraform, Ansible, Kubernetes, Helm, Docker, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Git, AWS CloudFormation
•	Cloud Platforms: AWS (EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, Route 53, RDS, EBS, EFS, ALB, Auto Scaling, CloudWatch, CloudTrail, KMS, Systems Manager), EKS, ECS, Fargate
•	Skills: Infrastructure Automation, CI/CD Delivery, Cloud Networking, Linux System Administration, Container Orchestration, Observability and Monitoring, Incident Response and Runbooks, IAM Least Privilege, Encryption and Key Management, Vulnerability Remediation, High Availability and Multi-AZ Architecture
